because.text: Mixed dispositions after independent oracle reproduction of every checkable claim. ACCEPTED: ADR-004 criterion answered in the negative (blob never in eval's node-CAS transitive closure; Option 1 = P0-class divergence surface) - recorded as gate review 1 of >=3 for Option 2. CONFIRMED -> ADR-005 (wave totality): derived FALSE = interfere(K,I) is amplitude-zero (oracle: {ph=32768, am=0, en=-32512}; review's en=-32768 is a slip, am=0 exact) and silence cascades to all ancestors; Ph-only pins in Book II s6.2-6.4 lack field-level override semantics; no base-case wave for unpinned LITERALs; iterated decay 49151->36863->20735->6560->657->7->0 reproduced and unpinned by any vector (s5.1 already states quadratic decay - the 'crystallization narrative contradiction' framing corrected, suite gap adopted). REFUTED: 'Synthetic Exclusion Lemma' proof-gap - Book I s3.4 formally defines the metric (hash leaf=1, REF=2, APPLY recursive, synthetic nodes counted) and the R-S counterexample uses the v0.4 price; under v0.5 cost(R-S)=1+size(z) vs net growth size(z)-1, growth<cost holds with no exclusion lemma; budget-ordering already settled law. ACCEPTED (P3): governance failure modes filed upstream as s0fractal/warrant issues #5 #6 #7 with one precedent correction (ADR-004 opening shows the operative settlement standard is new demonstrable consequence, not new bytes). Blind pass-1 preserved as evidence.

subject.note: Kimi k2.6 post-release audit of v0.5.0 (analytical; 2 new P1 confirmed, 1 P1 refuted, ADR-004 gate review 1, governance P3)
